assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: The runbook starts with comprehensive pre-flight checks including cluster/node versions verification, cluster health checks with kubectl get nodes, pod health checks, and system pod status verification

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Includes the specific command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR)"' to check available versions in the Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Provides two methods for checking deprecated APIs: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' and the gcloud recommender insights command

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Includes the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33' with the required --master flag

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Provides verification commands to check control plane version, test API connectivity with kubectl, and verify system pods, along with expected outputs for each step

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Provides complete gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools: 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade [pool-name] --cluster CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --cluster-version 1.33' with direct upgrade to 1.33

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Provides multiple monitoring commands including 'watch kubectl get nodes', checking for stuck pods, and monitoring upgrade operations with gcloud container operations list

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Shows direct upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane, and direct node pool upgrades to 1.33 as well, which is appropriate for the version gap

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Comprehensive post-upgrade validation section covers checking final cluster state, node versions, pod health across all namespaces, deployments, StatefulSets, and cluster services

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes detailed troubleshooting section with commands for stuck upgrades, pod scheduling issues, and emergency rollback procedures including creating new pools at old versions
